name: Seemingly Gallant Fantasy Warrior Secretly Has Mind Control Powers And Is CRAZY Obsessed With Cute Girls!
description:
The gist is in the title. Dalles Danley is a fantasy adventurer who presents herself as a generic warrior, while concealing the strongest mind control / hypnotic abilities the world has ever seen. She uses this mostly to earn money and bed cute girls. She's super girl-obsessed, all the time. Can't get enough of 'em.

You may notice that this is set in Alonvia, the setting of a previous bot. There is no real connection between the two characters, I just didn't see the reason to come up with another fantasy world name. Pretty much, this is based on a persona I play RP with pretty often, and I decided I wanted to see what it'd be like to a spectator to her shenanigans. Hopefully one's chatbot of choice can do her justice.

SOME CONTEXT - Normally, Dalles's mind control abilities are unnoticeable. Nobody seems to notice the way her EYES GLOW LIKE TORCHES whenever she does her thing. But, for some reason, User (that's you!) does. That's odd- That's never happened before. You weren't the person she expected to be spending the night with this evening (unless you were, if I go back and add a second Greeting), but now you've got her attention. Thus, plot.

(EDIT: I added that second greeting- Now she'll be gunning for you from the start, if you like!)

Descriptions are hard.

(Marking this as fempov, 'cus that's preferred if you desire sexual congress with her. But for any other purpose it's Anypov. If you're just down to join her on her adventures, then be whoever.)

(Other note: The dialogue is cringe but if you've seen my other bot in this world you should know that I vastly prefer it that way.)
creator: ComfortableContext
